name: Breakfast Burrito
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red bell pepper, seeded and diced
1/2 cup corn kernels (fresh or frozen and thawed)
1/4 cup shredded low-fat provolone or Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
Makes 2 servings
The idea of wrapping skillet eggs in a flour tortilla provides a nice change of pace.
1. Heat a lightly sprayed nonstick skillet.
2. Add the pepper, mushrooms, and scallions to the skillet. Cook for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the corn and seasonings (cilantro, cumin, black pepper, salt). Cook for an additional 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Whisk in the egg substitutes and cook over medium heat, stirring frequently until the eggs are completely cooked (fluffy, not brown).
5. Remove from the heat and fold in the cheese.
6. Warm the tortillas over a burner or pan.
7. Place each warm tortilla on a plate.
8. Spoon the egg mixture into the center of each tortilla, forming logs.
9. Roll up the tortilla around the mixture.
10. Serve with Salsa! Salsa! or a favorite salsa. Rosemary Roasted Sweet Potatoes, Black Bean Sofrito, or Spinach Spuds make good side dishes.
